place: Bang Makham, Ang Thong, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Nine-Villa Hillside Sea-View Pool Collection, Bang Makham
blurb: A private, gated collection of nine hillside pool villas above Bang Makham, on Koh Samui's quiet north-west coast, framed by sea, mountain and sunset views. Two-, three- and four-bedroom homes pair modern European architecture with tropical calm — double-volume living rooms, floor-to-ceiling glass, private pools and integrated smart-home systems throughout. Ownership structured for foreign buyers via registered leasehold with superficies, usufruct or a Thai company. From ฿17,900,000.
detail:
A HILLSIDE COLLECTION ABOVE BANG MAKHAM
Set in the peaceful hills of Bang Makham — an emerging prime address on Koh Samui's north-west coast — this gated community holds just nine private pool villas across a 3.2-rai (5,120 m²) site. Each home is oriented to capture the setting's defining feature: unobstructed views over the mountains and out to the sea, with sunsets to close the day. Privacy and security come built in, with only nine residences behind the gates.

MODERN EUROPEAN DESIGN
The architecture blends modern European lines with the natural island setting. Interiors are defined by double-volume living rooms, open-plan layouts and floor-to-ceiling windows that draw light and landscape deep into the home. Bedrooms come with en-suite bathrooms and walk-in wardrobes, kitchens are fitted with European-standard appliances, and smart-home systems are integrated throughout, with add-on packages available.

THE VILLAS
Buyers choose from three single-family pool-villa layouts, each with a private pool and covered parking. Prices rise with plot size and position; of the nine plots, one four-bedroom villa is already sold.
2-Bedroom Pool Villa — 244 m² interior · land from 300 m² — from ฿17,900,000
3-Bedroom Pool Villa — 252–293 m² interior · land 332–718 m² — from ฿20,900,000
4-Bedroom Pool Villa (+ multipurpose room) — 414 m² interior · land 557–742 m² — from ฿26,900,000

OWNERSHIP
Structured within a fully legal, secure framework. Freehold ownership is available to Thai individuals. For foreign buyers, the core route is a 30-year registered leasehold combined with a superficies agreement — registered against the land title, this secures outright ownership of the villa structure itself, with inheritance rights carried through the lease. Usufruct or a properly structured Thai company are available as alternatives to strengthen long-term security, all compliant with Thai law.

KEY FACTS
Location: Bang Makham, Koh Samui — emerging north-west coast address
Gated community of nine private pool villas on a 3.2-rai (5,120 m²) site
Sea, mountain and sunset views
Double-volume living, floor-to-ceiling glass, integrated smart-home systems
European-standard appliances, en-suite bedrooms, walk-in wardrobes
Developer with 20+ years in luxury real estate; property management available
Freehold for Thai nationals; foreigners via registered leasehold + superficies, usufruct or a Thai company
Sold off-plan on a milestone payment schedule
From ฿17,900,000; completion date and current availability confirmed on request
